name: ETH Squeeze Hold Release v1
edge_mechanism: volatility squeeze release that only enters after post-break persistence above fast value
thesis: ETH 4h is the cleaner similar-asset lane for a squeeze-release test because range compression on ETH can resolve into a brief persistence phase even when the broader regime is choppy. The edge should come from entering after the breakout proves it can hold, not from paying up on the first bar.
invalidation_condition: Abort if squeeze releases are too sparse, if post-break holds fail to persist, or if management cannot overcome false-release churn.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: Compression resolves into expansion, then price holds above fast value long enough to justify a continuation entry on the second leg rather than the first break.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: Even in broad chop, compression-release episodes can produce brief directional persistence. ETH is the clean control lane for testing that without alt noise.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: ETH 4h is appropriate because squeeze structure is readable and post-break persistence is less chaotic than on thinner assets.

indicator_role_map.EMA_55: deeper trend context and failure exit reference

pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: If releases mean-revert immediately instead of holding, the persistence filter still will not create enough post-cost edge.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If persistence entries are valid but travel is too short, reduce target ambition before tightening the squeeze definition.
pre_submit_reasoning.expected_outcome_pattern: Selective entries with a decent first-target hit rate and occasional modest runner contribution.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_success: ETH 4h and one cross-lane show tradable density and positive follow-through after post-break hold.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_failure: 0 trades, too few setups, or persistence holds that repeatedly fail to extend.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; squeeze and hold are sequential
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: managed by moderate squeeze thresholds rather than extreme rarity

test_lanes.why_included: Cleanest control lane for compression release persistence.
test_lanes.continue_if: Release-hold setups show enough density and positive follow-through after costs.
test_lanes.rotate_away_if: Setups are too sparse or holds fail to extend.
test_lanes.expected_if_right: A modest number of clean persistence entries after release.

test_lanes.why_included: Checks whether the mechanism transfers to the primary basket asset.
test_lanes.expected_if_right: Slightly noisier but still tradable post-break persistence.

test_lanes.why_included: Tests whether the same persistence filter can survive a wilder lane.
test_lanes.continue_if: TAO preserves the mechanism without degenerating into chaos.
test_lanes.expected_if_right: Fewer but larger persistence events than ETH.

long: Exit remaining 20% on close back through EMA_55 or 4 bars
short: Exit remaining 20% on close back through EMA_55 or 4 bars
